message:
Close xf-11.1.1 and xf-11.1.2: DM context feature complete

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"xf-10","title":"Test Issue","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T19:03:06.322242-05:00","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-01-10T19:03:13.179271-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T19:03:13.179271-05:00","close_reason":"Test issue - deleting"}
 {"id":"xf-11","title":"xf UX & Reliability Improvements","description":"## Overview

UX + reliability improvements across DM context, stats analytics, REPL, doctor, and natural‑language dates.

## Cross‑Cutting Requirements

- **No regression** in search/indexing results.
- **Stable JSON schemas** for machine use.
- **Local‑only** operations (privacy‑first).

## Testing Expectations

- Every feature includes unit + integration + E2E coverage.
- E2E scripts must log command, output, exit code, and timing.
- Quality gates: `cargo check`, `cargo clippy -D warnings`, `cargo fmt --check`, and feature tests.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All five feature areas shipped with tests + docs
- [ ] No regressions in CLI behavior
- [ ] E2E scripts available for each feature with detailed logging
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-10T19:03:43.51052-05:00","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-01-10T22:20:13.088099482-05:00"}
 {"id":"xf-11.1","title":"DM Conversation Viewer (--context flag)","description":"## Overview

Implement DM conversation context for `xf search --types dm --context`, enabling full thread display with highlighted matches.

## Key Behaviors

- Context mode only applies to DM results.
- Deduplicate by conversation_id.
- Support all output formats (text/json/csv/compact).
- Preserve privacy (local-only).

## Test Strategy

- Unit tests for storage + context rendering helpers.
- Integration tests for `cmd_search` behavior and JSON schema.
- E2E script validating context output + exit codes with detailed logs.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `--context` works for DM searches without errors
- [ ] Deduplication + highlight correct for multiple matches
- [ ] Output formats consistent and stable
- [ ] Comprehensive tests + E2E logging
","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-10T19:04:10.48158-05:00","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-01-10T22:19:19.612386498-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"xf-11.1","depends_on_id":"xf-11","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z"}]}
-{"id":"xf-11.1.1","title":"Add get_conversation_messages to storage.rs","description":"## Goal

Add `Storage::get_conversation_messages(conversation_id)` that returns **all** DM messages for a conversation in deterministic chronological order, preserving all stored fields.

## Implementation Notes

- Query `direct_messages` by `conversation_id`.
- **Ordering**: `ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC` to break timestamp ties deterministically.
- **Field preservation**: include `conversation_id` in the returned struct (add to `DirectMessage` if missing) or expose it via an explicit return type so `cmd_search --context` can group reliably.
- **Parsing**: RFC3339 timestamps → `DateTime<Utc>`; malformed rows should be skipped (consistent with existing `get_all_*` patterns).
- **Performance**: use a prepared statement; avoid extra allocations for JSON fields.

## Tests (storage.rs)

### Unit
- **Chronological order**: store messages out of order and assert returned order by timestamp then id.
- **Empty conversation**: missing `conversation_id` returns empty vec (no error).
- **Single message**: returns exactly one with all fields intact.
- **Field preservation**: URLs + media JSON round‑trip; `conversation_id` present and correct.
- **Malformed JSON**: ensure fallback to empty vec for urls/media without panicking.

### Integration
- `cmd_search --types dm --context` uses this method and outputs a full conversation.

### E2E Coverage
- Covered by `tests/e2e/dm_context_test.sh` (validate grouped conversation output).

## Logging

- `debug!` on query start/end with conversation_id + count.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Method added with deterministic ordering
- [ ] Returns empty vec for missing conversation_id
- [ ] Preserves conversation_id + all message fields
- [ ] Unit tests cover ordering, empty, single, field preservation
- [ ] Integration/E2E coverage via DM context tests
","notes":"Started implementation of --context DM viewer: added get_conversation_messages to storage.rs and context output pipeline in cmd_search; added conversation context structs, grouping by conversation_id, and text/JSON rendering; added unit test for get_conversation_messages; fixed stats JSON optional fields and filtered empty top_counts entries.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"SageDune","created_at":"2026-01-10T19:04:32.991463-05:00","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-01-10T22:26:39.30131756-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"xf-11.1.1","depends_on_id":"xf-11.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z"}]}
-{"id":"xf-11.1.2","title":"Implement DM context display in cmd_search","description":"## Goal

Implement DM conversation context output for `xf search --types dm --context` across **all** output formats, with deduplication and match highlighting.

## Behavior

- **Context applies only to DM results**. If `--context` is used without `--types dm`, print a single warning to stderr and fall back to normal output (no failure).
- Group results by `conversation_id` (from metadata or returned field) and show **each conversation once**.
- Within a conversation, mark all matched message IDs (not just first).
- Handle long conversations with a **context window** option if needed (default: full conversation for now; allow future `--context-window N`).

## Text Output

- Header per conversation with date range and participant IDs.
- Each message line shows timestamp, sender, text.
- Matched messages are highlighted and prefixed (e.g., `►`).

## JSON Output (stable)

```json
{
  "conversations": [
    {
      "conversation_id": "...",
      "participants": ["..."],
      "messages": [
        {"id":"...","created_at":"...","sender_id":"...","text":"...","matched":true}
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

## CSV/Compact Output

- CSV: emit one row per message with `conversation_id` + `matched` flag.
- Compact: one line per message, include `conversation_id` prefix and `*` for matched.

## Edge Cases

- Missing `conversation_id` → skip with warning.
- Empty conversations → skip.
- Multiple matches in same conversation → shown once, all matched flagged.

## Tests

### Unit
- Grouping + dedup by conversation_id.
- Highlighting: all matched IDs flagged.
- Missing conversation_id handled gracefully.
- Output helpers for text/compact/CSV/JSON.

### Integration
- `--context` with DM types uses conversation output.
- `--context` without DM types warns and uses default output.
- JSON schema matches expected.

### E2E Script (tests/e2e/dm_context_test.sh)
- Validates: header present, matched indicators, JSON schema, CSV/compact rows.
- Logs command, output, and duration per test.

## Logging Requirements

- `info!` when switching into context mode.
- `debug!` per conversation (id, message_count, matched_count).
- `warn!` for missing conversation_id.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `--context` no longer errors
- [ ] Conversations deduped; all matches highlighted
- [ ] Text/JSON/CSV/Compact outputs supported
- [ ] Warnings for misused `--context` and missing IDs
- [ ] Unit + integration + E2E tests with detailed logs

- **Parsing**: RFC3339 timestamps → `DateTime<Utc>`; malformed rows should be skipped (consistent with existing `get_all_*` patterns).
- **Performance**: use a prepared statement; avoid extra allocations for JSON fields.

- `debug!` on query start/end with conversation_id + count.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Method added with deterministic ordering

 {"id":"xf-11.1.3","title":"Add unit tests for DM context functionality","description":"## Goal

Comprehensive test coverage for DM context, including storage, formatting, and CLI integration across all output formats.

## Unit Tests

### Storage
- Chronological order (timestamp + id tiebreaker).
- Empty conversation returns empty vec.
- Single message and full field preservation.

### Formatting Helpers
- Text formatting marks matched messages and shows conversation header.
- JSON formatter includes `matched` flag and stable schema.
- CSV/compact emit per-message rows with conversation_id and matched flag.

## Integration Tests

- `xf search --types dm --context` returns conversation output.
- `--context` without DM types emits a warning and falls back to default output.
- JSON output contains `conversations` array with `matched` flags.
- CSV/compact outputs have expected columns/prefixes.

## E2E Script (tests/e2e/dm_context_test.sh)

- Validates:
  - header presence
  - matched markers
  - JSON schema via `jq`
  - CSV/compact output shape
- Logs: timestamp, command, stdout/stderr, exit code, and duration.

## Logging Requirements

- Unit tests log conversation_id and message_count.
- E2E logs include timing and failure context.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Unit + integration + E2E coverage across all formats
- [ ] Deterministic assertions (no reliance on wall-clock)
- [ ] Logs are detailed and actionable on failure
","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T19:06:59.983466-05:00","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-01-10T22:19:36.450793309-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"xf-11.1.3","depends_on_id":"xf-11.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z"},{"issue_id":"xf-11.1.3","depends_on_id":"xf-11.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z"},{"issue_id":"xf-11.1.3","depends_on_id":"xf-11.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z"}]}
 {"id":"xf-11.1.4","title":"Update CLI help text and README for --context flag","description":"## Goal

Document `--context` for DM searches in CLI help + README with clear examples and JSON schema.

## CLI Help (cli.rs)

- Expand `--context` help to specify:
  - Works only with `--types dm`
  - Shows full conversation with matched highlights
  - Example usage

## README Updates

- Feature bullet for DM context.
- Usage example showing text output with highlight marker.
- JSON schema snippet for `--format json`.

## Tests

### Integration
- `xf search --help` includes `--context` description and example string.
- `xf search --types dm --context` output matches documented markers.

### E2E
- Extend `tests/e2e/dm_context_test.sh` to verify the README example output still matches (sanity check).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `xf search --help` documents `--context` clearly
- [ ] README includes example + JSON schema
- [ ] Integration/E2E tests verify docs stay in sync

 {"id":"xf-11.2","title":"Enhanced Stats Dashboard (--detailed flag)","description":"## Overview

Upgrade `xf stats` into a detailed analytics dashboard with temporal, engagement, and content insights.

## Output & UX

- Text mode: sectioned analytics, sparklines, colored emphasis.
- JSON: stable schema for automation.
- Performance target: <2s on 100k tweets.

## Required Analytics

- Temporal: activity trends, day/hour distributions, longest gaps.
- Engagement: likes/retweets totals, histograms, top tweets.
- Content: media ratio, threads, top hashtags/mentions, avg length.

## Test Strategy

### Unit
- SQL aggregation correctness for each stat.
- Edge cases: empty archive, single tweet, missing metrics.

### Integration
- `xf stats --detailed` text output contains all sections.
- JSON output includes `temporal`, `engagement`, `content` keys.

### E2E
- `tests/e2e/stats_detailed_test.sh` validates output and performance with logs.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All analytics computed correctly and quickly
- [ ] Text + JSON outputs stable
- [ ] Comprehensive unit/integration/E2E tests with detailed logging
","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-10T19:07:22.685312-05:00","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-01-10T23:13:14.813224-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T23:13:14.813224-05:00","close_reason":"All subtasks completed (temporal, engagement, content analytics, CLI integration, tests)","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"xf-11.2","depends_on_id":"xf-11","type":"parent-child","created_at":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z"}]}
